Class PlayerService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.profile.service.PlayerService
public class PlayerService extends Object
Core service for player management logic. Orchestrates player joins, quits, and playtime calculations by coordinating between player and session repositories and the in-memory profile manager.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayerService

      public PlayerService(IPlayerRepository playerRepository, ISessionRepository sessionRepository, ProfileManager profileManager)
      Constructs a new PlayerService.
      Parameters:
      playerRepository - the player data repository
      sessionRepository - the session history repository
      profileManager - the in-memory profile cache

  • Method Details

    • handleJoin

      public CompletableFuture<UserProfile> handleJoin(UUID uuid, String mcUsername)
      Handles a player joining the server. Loads or creates the player's record in the database, closes any lingering open sessions from previous crashes, starts a new session, and caches the profile in memory.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      mcUsername - the player's current username
      Returns:
      a future containing the loaded UserProfile

    • handleQuit

      public CompletableFuture<Void> handleQuit(UUID uuid)
      Handles a player quitting the server. Closes their active session, updates their cumulative playtime and offline status in the database, and removes their profile from the in-memory cache.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a future that completes when all quit logic is finished

    • getTotalPlaytime

      public CompletableFuture<Long> getTotalPlaytime(UUID uuid)
      Calculates the total cumulative playtime for a player. This includes both stored playtime from previous sessions and the duration of their currently active session if they are online.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a future containing total playtime in seconds
